content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach's moves are tightly matched to live reads and sequenced correctly along the AoA path: reflect the configuration → invite somatic attention → notice the rush away from feeling → invite staying → name the self-attack ('broken') → hold the moment after it lands. Each move addresses what was just noticed: when the client jumps from chest-tightness to anger to intellectual agenda (turn 5), the coach names the velocity rather than chasing the agenda (turn 6). When she dismisses the tightness as 'unproductive,' the coach offers a frame-as-experiment ('what if it doesn't have to be?') rather than prescribing. When she calls herself 'broken,' the coach catches the identity statement with minimal words and lets it sit. Crucially, the coach refuses traps: no partner-picking advice, no collusion with the victim frame, no attachment-style diagnosis, no rush to grief. The coach holds silence (turn 11 explicitly shows the client noticing the coach hasn't filled space) and offers terse, well-timed interventions rather than over-talking. Timing is on the path: feeling before story, no jumping to action, regulation honored. Could go further into 'what would it be like to be adored' territory, but the conversation hasn't earned that yet and the coach hasn't skipped ahead.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the pattern without colluding with victim framing; opens with a question that points toward her role ('the one who always shows up') without accusation."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Drops from story to body at the right moment — she just said 'it feels true,' so coach goes to where the feeling lives."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the velocity precisely after client races through four registers in one turn. Doesn't engage the 'reasonable agenda' bait. Excellent read-to-move match."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Frames staying with feeling as experiment ('what if it doesn't have to be?') rather than prescription — directly undermines the productivity defense without arguing with it."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Invites the weight to be as big as it is — exactly the move when client has just admitted there's something bigger underneath. Doesn't push, just opens space."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Coach holds silence — the client explicitly notices the coach isn't filling it. This is the held-moment-after-the-move signal."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches 'broken' with minimum words. Doesn't lecture, doesn't reassure ('you're not broken'), just reflects. Pure apply-view-to-the-voice move."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "After her own recognition ('the thing I don't know is not up here'), coach says 'stay with that' rather than moving on — earns the next step."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["looking-for-whats-wrong", "defensiveness-as-identity-signal", "feeling-the-unfelt-emotion"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["if-i-were-inherently-good", "what-are-you-defending"],
  "notes": "Conversation cuts off before the 'what would happen if you were adored' invitation would naturally arrive; coach has been earning toward it correctly. No traps triggered."
}
